text: The food was absolutely delicious and fresh, but the service was painfully slow. The staff seemed uninterested in helping us.
Excellent quality dishes, reasonable prices, and a very clean restaurant. The ambiance was wonderful!
The delivery came very late and cold. But the quality of food makes up for it. Packaging could be better though.
الطعام كان رائع جدا والجودة ممتازة، لكن السعر مرتفع جداً والموقع يحتاج توقف سيارات أفضل.
خدمة العملاء سيئة جداً، الموظفون غير ودودين. لكن الطعام نظيف وطازج وذو طعم لذيذ.
Great atmosphere and friendly staff. The food is amazing but a bit expensive for the portion size.
Dirty tables and poor hygiene. The food was bland and tasteless. Never coming back!
جودة الطعام ممتازة والخدمة سريعة جداً. الأسعار معقولة جداً والموقف نظيف وآمن.
The packaging was poor and arrived damaged. However, the product quality was excellent and delivery was fast.
Horrible experience! The service was terrible, food was cold, and the place was filthy. Very disappointed.
